description_long: This is a large, ancient-style ceramic vase with a wide, flared rim and two rounded handles on either side. The body of the vase is decorated with intricate black-figure artwork, depicting human figures and animals in a classical Greek motif. The surface shows a matte, slightly rough texture, with visible wear and some discoloration, suggesting age and historical significance. The handles are robust and integrated into the body, providing both functional and decorative value. The base is slightly narrower than the body, allowing the vase to stand securely on flat surfaces. The overall color palette consists of earthy terracotta tones with contrasting black painted designs.
description: A large, ancient-style terracotta vase with black-figure Greek artwork, flared rim, and two rounded handles. The surface is matte and slightly worn, with intricate classical motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed black-figure artwork of human and animal motifs, with both handles and the wide rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting one handle and the unadorned, textured back of the vase, with less artwork visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both handles and the plain, textured surface with minimal decoration.
description_view_3: Angled view showing part of the artwork and one handle, with the rim and base in clear profile.
attribute_pattern: classical Greek motifs with human and animal figures
